title: taraxacum subsaeviforme
intro: Taraxacum subsaeviforme, also known as the rough-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subsaeviforme include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver and kidney function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
